rulings.Case Title: SALVADOR DURAN et al VS. ANITA CONSUELO VILLAREAL et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, November 17, 2014, Line 3: PLAINTIFFS SALVADOR DURAN, SERGIO DURAN and VALDEMAR DURAN'S Motion To Compel Archdiecese Of San Francisco'S Compliance With Deposition Dubpoena For Production Of Business Records: GRANTED in part and DENIED in part as follows: Motion is GRANTED as to the following: (1) documents re: addresses where Gabriel Flores lived since January 2011 to present; (2) addresses where Gabriel Flores was assigned housing since January 2011 to present; (3) parish assignments for Gabriel Flores since January 2011 to present; (4) any change of address given by Gabriel Flores since January 2011 to present; Motion is DENIED as to the requests regarding Gabriel Flores' medical condition and retirement at this time. The issues may be re-addressed if these issues are brought up by Gabriel Flores during deposition. Responsive documents shall be produced within 10 days of notice of entry of this order. (501/REQ)
